title: Functions and Arrays
description: Learn how to create reusable functions and work with arrays in C++ for efficient data storage and manipulation.
learningObjectives: Define and use functions in C++
Understand function parameters and return values
Work with arrays for storing multiple values
Apply functions and arrays in practical scenarios

subtopics.title: Functions
Function Overloading
Arrays
Multidimensional Arrays
Passing Arrays to Functions

recommendedTools.name: Debugger
recommendedTools.reason: Online C++ debugger for testing code

glossary.definition: A reusable block of code that performs a specific task.
A variable in a function definition that receives a value when the function is called.
The type of value a function returns.
Creating multiple functions with the same name but different parameters.
A collection of elements of the same type stored in contiguous memory.
A number used to access an element in an array (starts at 0).
An array with more than one dimension, like a matrix.
